Class ClusterHealth

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.cluster.ClusterHealth
public class ClusterHealth extends Object
Information about the cluster health. Contains currently only the top level elements returned from Elasticsearch.
Since:
4.2
Author:
Peter-Josef Meisch
